DEPARTMENT OF EARTH SCIENCE
ASSAM UNIVERSITY: SILCHAR
NOTICE
Date: 29.08.2025
Following is the list of three (03) eligible candidates who attended the Second and Final round of Spot
Admission held on 29.08.2025, are selected for admission in MSc Applied Geology Programme of the
department against the vacancies existing under different categories.

The candidates are asked to take admission on 30.08.2025 (Saturday) by paying the requisite
admission fee online by using the Payment link which will be available on the dashboard of Assam
University Samarth (Non-CUET) admission portal of each candidate. The payment link will remain
active on 30.08.2025 from 11.00 am to 11.55pm.
(Prof. M. F. Hussain)
Head of the Department
Copy To:
1. The Chairman, University Admission Committee, AUS
2. The Nodal Officer, Samarth Admission Portal, AUS for uploading in the Non-CUET admission
portal of the University.
3. Registrar, AUS
4. PS to Vice-Chancellor, AUS for kind information of the Hon'ble Vice-Chancellor.

meritList.title: Notification regarding Spot Admission on 26th August for Department of Physics, Silchar Campus
meritList.rawText:
ASSAM UNIVERSITY, SILCHAR
DEPARTMENT OF PHYSICS
NOTICE
Dt. 22nd August, 2025
The Department of Physics, Assam University, Silchar announces a few vacant seats which will be
filled through Spot Admission scheduled on 26th August 2025 (Tuesday) at 11:00 AM in the
Department.
Eligibility Criteria:
• Admission will be purely on the basis of CUET score.
•
Candidate must have secured at least 60% marks in Physics (Honours/Pass) at the
undergraduate level.
Vacancy Position:
• GEN-01
OBC-03
•
SC-05
•
ST-05
•
EWS-03
Total Vacancy Available: 17
Interested and eligible candidates are hereby informed to appear for admission with all necessary
documents in original along with photocopies.
Copy to:
1. The Chairperson, Assam University Admission Committee.
2. The Director, Computer center, AUS
3. The Registrar, AUS
4. File.
Head, Department of Physics
Assam University, Silchar
fre
22/08/2025
Head, Department of Physics

meritList.title: Notification regarding Spot Admission Merit List, Department of Pharmaceutical Science(CUET), Silchar Campus
meritList.rawText:
Department of Pharmaceutical Sciences,
Assam University, Silchar - 788011
Notification for CUET Spot Admission to B. Pharm Course for the
Academic Session - 2025-2026.
The Department of Pharmaceutical Sciences, Susrutha School of Medical and Paramedical
Sciences, Assam University, Silchar, invites eligible candidates for spot admission to the
B. Pharm course for the academic session 2025-26 against the following vacancies under
CUET category.
:S. No
Category
No of Seats
1.
Unreserved
08
2.
EWS
01
3.
OBC-NCL
03
4.
SC
02
5.
ST
02
Date of Spot Admission: 28th August 2025
Venue: Department of Pharmaceutical Sciences (Old Block), Assam University, Silchar
Reporting Time: The candidates must report the department latest by 11.30 am. After that
no candidature will be entertained.
Eligibility:
1 Candidates enumerated in the published list (Date of publication 12.08.2025) of
provisionally eligible candidates with CUET scores and rank.
Note: Admission will be purely on merit basis, determined by CUET scores and rank
of eligible candidates.
Instructions for Candidates:
The candidate should bring the copy of CUET application form submitted to the
Assam University, Silchar and valid ID card.
Fee Payment:
Selected candidates must pay the prescribed admission fees (Rs. 70,210.00) through
online mode in SAMARTH portal within the given time frame.
No cash payments will be accepted.

Subject: Request for Approval to Upload Non-CUET and Spot Admission Merit List
Respected Sir,
On behalf of the Departmental Admission Committee of the Department of Library and
Information Science, I am writing to inform you that we have successfully completed the
evaluation process of Non-CUET and Spot Admission for the PG Programme admissions for the
academic session 2025-26.
The Committee has carefully reviewed all applications received and has finalised the list of
shortlisted candidates in accordance with the university's admission guidelines and reservation
norms.
Please find the list of shortlisted candidates enclosed herewith for your kind perusal.
We seek your kind approval to upload the Merit List of Non-CUET and Spot Admission on
the Samarth Admission Portal.
We shall remain grateful for your kind consideration.
With kind regards.

21.02-25
Date: 17/07/2025
Subject: Request for Approval to Upload Shortlisted Candidates on Samarth Portal
Respected Sir,
On behalf of the Departmental Admission Committee of the Department of Library and
Information Science, I am writing to inform you that we have successfully completed the
evaluation process for the PG Programme admissions for the academic session 2025-26.
The Committee has carefully reviewed all applications received and has finalised the list of
shortlisted candidates in accordance with the university's admission guidelines and reservation
norms.
Please find the list of shortlisted candidates enclosed herewith for your kind perusal.
We now seek your kind approval to upload the shortlisted candidates' list on the Samarth
Admission Portal.
We shall remain grateful for your kind consideration.
With kind regards.
Enclosure:
1. List of Shortlisted Candidates
Yours sincerely.
17/11/2025
(Dr. Muktut Sarmah)
